description: CompositionBluish-grey short sleeved sheer blouse with a pin tuck and lace bib on the bust, stitched buttons on the bib, and a tie-up necklineFittingRegularWash careHandle garment delicatelyCold hand wash separately with delicate detergentDo not soak, bleach or tumble dryDrip dry in shadeCool iron on reverse sideDo not iron lace trim/embellishmentsDry cleanableTake feminine dressing to the next level with this bluish-grey blouse from S Oliver. The soft billowy fabric,and lace bib give it a dreamy feel. Team this top with slim Fit pants and pumps for the perfect look. Model statisticsThe model wears size MHeight-5.9", Chest-33"
